topic: Tenses Part 1 — Present Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous)

tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Tenses Part 1 — Present Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Tenses Part 1 — Present Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I eat rice every day. I am eating food right now. I have eaten food. I have been studying for an hour. She goes to work every day.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Tenses Part 1 — Present Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Tenses Part 1 — Present Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: She is working right now. She has finished her work. She has been working for two hours. They go to school every day. They are playing now.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "उन्होंने अपना homework कर लिया है।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "I have been studying for an hour yesterday."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I have been studying for an hour.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Tenses Part 1 — Present Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Tenses Part 1 — Present Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I exercise every morning. I am reading now. I have read this book. I have been reading this book for three hours.
